creator: jhale@FreeBSD.org
text:
I've updated audio/picard to version 2.8: https://cgit.freebsd.org/ports/commit/?id=30e156a5a27c8b5525a6199e8dbba2302d1826fc

If you are still having issues with Picard not related to the port, please file a bug upstream: https://tickets.metabrainz.org/projects/PICARD/issues/
